# Fixolutions
> Fixolutions is a modern, end-to-end after-sales operating system and service intelligence platform for white goods, home appliances, and consumer electronics.

## Core Pages
- [Home Page](/index.html): Explains the Fixolutions platform, service workflow, and our product suite.
- [Kinetic App](/kinetic.html): Our smart home service consumer app for booking repairs, tracking technicians in real-time, and verifying service steps.
- [Team](/team.html): Meet the builders, designers, and strategists behind Fixolutions Systems.

## Resources
- [Blog Insights](/blog/index.html): Practical strategies, industry trends, and expert insights to help run a smarter, more efficient service organization.
- [Reducing Technician Idle Time](/blog/posts/reduce-technician-idle-time.html): 5 practical ways to reduce field service technician idle time and increase productivity.
